evals.prompt: Build me a Pomodoro timer app for Apogee. It should have a 25-minute countdown, a 5-minute break mode, track how many sessions I've done today, and use AI to give me an encouraging message when I finish a session.
evals.expected_output: A complete scaffolded React app in apps/pomodoro-timer/ with: working countdown timer, start/stop/reset, session counter, AI encouragement on session complete (using streamCompletion), OasisState status badge in header, back-to-launcher button, single-file build, and upload to Apogee.

assertions.name: vite_config_uses_singlefile
assertions.description: vite.config.js imports and uses viteSingleFile plugin

assertions.name: webai_js_created
assertions.description: src/webai.js exists with streamCompletion and getOasisHost

assertions.name: package_json_has_description
assertions.description: package.json has a non-empty description field

assertions.name: timer_logic_present
assertions.description: App.jsx has countdown/timer logic (setInterval or useState for time)

assertions.name: ai_integration_present
assertions.description: App.jsx calls streamCompletion for AI encouragement

assertions.name: release_in_finally
assertions.description: release() is called in a finally block (prevents runtime lock)

evals.prompt: Create a webAI app called 'Daily Standup' — a simple standup meeting helper where I can type what I did yesterday, what I'm doing today, and any blockers, and then click a button to have AI rewrite it in a clear, concise standup format and copy it to my clipboard.
evals.expected_output: React app in apps/daily-standup/ with three text inputs (yesterday/today/blockers), an AI rewrite button that streams a formatted standup summary, a copy-to-clipboard button on the output, OasisState badge, back-to-launcher button, and single-file build.

assertions.name: three_inputs_present
assertions.description: App.jsx has state or inputs for yesterday, today, and blockers

assertions.name: streaming_output
assertions.description: Streaming output is displayed token by token

evals.prompt: Make me a vocab flashcard app for Apogee. I should be able to add words and their definitions, quiz myself (show word, reveal definition on click), rate how well I knew it (easy/hard), and have an AI button that generates an example sentence using the word to help me remember it.
evals.expected_output: React app in apps/vocab-flashcards/ with: add-word form, flashcard flip interaction, easy/hard rating, AI example sentence generation per word, word list persisted in localStorage, OasisState badge, and single-file build.

assertions.name: flip_interaction
assertions.description: Card flip or reveal interaction is implemented

assertions.name: add_word_form
assertions.description: Form to add new words exists
